oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Loro Parque Foundation’s Work Succeeds in Saving 9 Species of Parrots from Extinction
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Fundación, Loro Parque
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: This item originally appeared in AFA Watchbird Volume 46 Number 1 (2019).The following is an excerpt from the full PDF link.Loro Parque Foundation’s Work Succeeds in Saving 9 Species of Parrots from ExtinctionThese species were critically endangered and thanks to the effort of the Foundation, they have changed their endangered category, thus avoiding their disappearance.critically endangered and thanks to the effort of the Foundation, they have changed their endangered Cacatua haematuropygiaCacatua de Filipinas Red-tailed cockatoo RotsteißkakaduCacatua de Filipinas Red-tailed cockatoo Rotstei&kakaduClick the PDF link associated with this item to view the complete item as originally published.
